creator: freebsd@mhka.no
text:
(In reply to Jamie Gritton from comment #6)
That does indeed sound like a more correct implementation.

Furthermore, it should still be possible to override the default FIB by running setfib inside the jail, as such:
# jexec some_jail_with_default_fib_2 setfib 3 ping 10.0.3.1

At least I didn't get any immediate errors when doing this, and "setfib 1 jexec devsamba setfib 0 ping 8.8.8.8" made ping run in FIB 0 on my system.
